note: INDEXNOW_ENABLED=false (default). No real submissions made. To activate, set INDEXNOW_ENABLED=true + INDEXNOW_KEY in Production env and serve /[key].txt.
activationChecklist: Set INDEXNOW_KEY=<key> in Vercel Production env only (NOT Preview)
Create public/<key>.txt containing just the key
Set INDEXNOW_ENABLED=true in Vercel Production env only
Test dry-run: verify urlsForMatchChange() output is correct
Monitor Bing Webmaster Tools for submission acceptance
Do NOT set these vars in Preview to avoid polluting the submission quota with non-production URLs
